package rulefixtures

import (
	"html/template"
)

// scenario for template_html_unescaped: `template.HTML(userInput)` or `template.JS(userInput)` type conversions on data from request parameters
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario739Positive(userInput string) template.HTML {
	return template.HTML(userInput)
}
